title: Add navigation visibility and API feature gating when key is missing
acceptance_criteria: Import entry points are hidden in navigation when OPENAI_API_KEY is unset
Import backend endpoints reject access safely when OPENAI_API_KEY is unset
When OPENAI_API_KEY exists navigation and routes are visible and operational
Tests cover both gated and enabled feature states
deliverables: tests for key-present and key-absent behavior
completion_summary: Added AI-key feature gating for import navigation, quick actions, route access, and import server actions with key-present/key-missing tests.
